text:
EXPLANATION: This is a well-known historical mathematical treatise published in 1785 by the Marquis de Condorcet, which is widely recognized as a foundational work in social choice theory.
LINK: https://gallica.bnf.fr/ark:/12148/bpt6k63004085
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l’application de l’analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Nicolas de Condorcet
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
